---
title: "01_genetic_contribution"
output: html_document
---

Import required library
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(gtsummary)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r}
dataset_path <- "/Users/sorenbasnet/Documents/Github/STAT_443_FINAL_PROJECT/data/genetic_contributors"
```

Read in data files
```{r}
data_patient_mutations <- read.table(file.path(dataset_path,"data_patient_mutation_march_8.txt"),header=TRUE, sep=" ")

```


Lets try (for now, using genetic datamutations file were only one patient row)
```{r}
data_patient_mutations_unique <- data_patient_mutations %>% distinct(PATIENT_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

```{r}
write.table(data_patient_mutations_unique, "/Users/sorenbasnet/Documents/Github/STAT_443_FINAL_PROJECT/data/genetic_contributors_2/data_patient_mutations_unique.txt", sep=" ", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
```
